Load Hermosillo 2010 Analysis Configuration

Source: R/load_hermosillo_2010_analysis_config.R
load_hermosillo_2010_analysis_config.Rd

Loads the packaged JSON configuration for the Hermosillo 2010 analysis workflow and optionally merges overrides from another JSON file.

Usage

load_hermosillo_2010_analysis_config(path = NULL)

Arguments

path

Optional path to a JSON file containing configuration overrides.

Value

A normalized configuration list ready to pass to run_hermosillo_2010_analysis().

See also

Other hermosillo_analysis: plot_likelihood_surface(), plot_model_fit(), plot_observed_cases(), plot_profile_likelihood(), run_hermosillo_2010_analysis()

Examples

config <- load_hermosillo_2010_analysis_config()
config$outputs$write_outputs
#> [1] TRUE
